site.title: Mugilan Sakthivel
site.description: Mugilan Sakthivel — AI engineer in Salem, India.
site.author: Mugilan Sakthivel
site.keywords: Mugilan Sakthivel, AI engineer, agent engineer, LangGraph, DeepAgents, TypeScript, Python, portfolio, India

prose_lead: I'm an AI engineer from India — ==50+ agents built across 3 years==, from single-purpose automations to full business solutions that actually return ROI. By day I'm Head of Engineering at Metaflow; one of 12 across India in the [Young Minds Fellowship](https://ymf.org.in/), backed by partners at Accel.
prose_more: I love taking things from ==0 → 1== — talking to users, understanding what they actually want, and shaping the product around it. ==100-hour weeks==, for years, because building is what I enjoy most.

In the open I've shipped [caption-engine](https://github.com/mugilan-sakthivel/caption-engine), [Lua](https://github.com/tryLua/lua), and a [WhatsApp agent](https://github.com/mugilan-sakthivel/whatsapp-agent). Before Metaflow I founded Lua Labs.

GPT, Claude, Gemini; LangChain, LangGraph, Vercel AI / OpenAI / Claude SDKs; shipped end to end on GCP and AWS, monitored with LangSmith and Langfuse. My real edge: hand me anything new and I'm working in it ==within 24 hours==.
prose_tail: I also create content about AI as a creator on [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/mugilan__sakthivel/) — building in public, one reel at a time.

Say hi on [GitHub](https://github.com/mugilan-sakthivel), [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mugilansakthivel/), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/mugilan__sakthivel/), [X](https://x.com/MugilanKani), or {email} if you want to talk.

rows.title: Multi-modal evidence review agents
rows.desc: 53rd of 12,885 worldwide — HackerRank Orchestrate, a 24-hour build (June 2026). Agents judging damage-claim photos against the claim, history and evidence rules.
